title: narcissus asturiensis subsp. vasconicus
intro: Narcissus asturiensis subsp. vasconicus, also known as the Spanish winter narcissus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Narcissus asturiensis subsp. vasconicus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat a range of health issues, from colds and flu to digestive problems and skin conditions.
